title: ophrys × buttleri
intro: Ophrys × buttleri, also known as the bee orchid hybrid, is a type of flowering plant that is a cross between the Ophrys sphegodes and Ophrys tenthredinifera. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × buttleri include its potential to be used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ophrys × buttleri is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
